diagrams.title: Store Operation Data Flow
diagrams.description: Block diagram showing data flow from CPU register through MDR to memory during store operation
diagrams.purpose: Visualize the path data takes during a store operation - from register to memory location. Shows that data flows OUT of the CPU, unlike fetch where data flows IN.

diagrams.title: Store Timing Diagram
diagrams.description: Timing diagram showing clock cycles and signal activities for a 3-cycle store operation
diagrams.purpose: Understand temporal relationship between control signals and bus activities. Shows why store takes multiple cycles and how signals must be sequenced.

diagrams.title: Endianness Comparison
diagrams.description: Visual comparison of big-endian and little-endian byte ordering for a 32-bit word
elements: Arrows showing MSB and LSB positions
diagrams.purpose: Clarify the difference between endian schemes and help remember which byte goes where. Critical for debugging memory layout issues.
